section: SCHEDULE A: Assets and Unearned Income

rows.asset_name: ZILLOW GROUP INC. CMN CLASS A
ZILLOW GROUP, INC. CMN SERIES C

uncertainties.read: Field-split Schedule A sheet: only the 'Value' block (Block B) is present, header Min/Max buckets None,$1-$1,000,$1,001-$15,000,$15,001-$50,000,$50,001-$100,000,$100,001-$250,000,$250,001-$500,000,$500,001-$1,000,000,$1,000,001-$5,000,000,$5,000,001-$25,000,000,$25,000,001-$50,000,000,Over $50,000,000 (last col printed 50,000,001 / 2,000,000,000). Type of Income (Block C), Amount of Income (Block D) and Transaction (Block E) blocks are on separate sheets and are nulled here. Block belongs to the 'Ritu Ahuja 1995 Trust' header, asset slice YUM CHINA HOLDINGS INC through ZOETIS INC (alphabetical Y-Z, continuation after page 149/150's W-Y slice which ended at YUM BRANDS). Merge by asset name.
